package.product_description:
AeroStride X1 — Running Shoe
-----------------------------------------------
Built from recycled mesh upper, carbon-fibre plate, the AeroStride X1 delivers
performance and style in equal measure.

Key features:
  • Energy-return foam midsole
• Carbon-fibre propulsion plate
• Recycled-mesh upper (30 % post-consumer material)
• Reflective heel tab for night runs
• True-to-size fit with wide-toe box

Available colours: Midnight Black, Solar Orange, Ice White
Price: $149.99
package.tagline: Step into the future — AeroStride X1.
package.ad_copy: Introducing the AeroStride X1 — the ultimate running shoe engineered for those who refuse to slow down. Featuring energy-return foam midsole, every step feels like flying. Now available in Midnight Black and more.
social_captions: 👟 Meet the AeroStride X1. Energy-return foam midsole. All day, every day. #NewRelease #Footwear
🔥 Fresh drop alert! AeroStride X1 in Midnight Black — limited stock. Grab yours for $149.99. #ShoeOfTheDay
💡 Why settle for ordinary? The AeroStride X1 redefines what a running shoe can be. #Innovation #Style
package.pricing_strategy:
Pricing tier : Mid-range
Rationale    : $149.99 supports strong quality-to-price ratio.
Suggested promo : 10 % launch discount → $134.99
